title: A Weekly summary of work done this week and work scheduled for next week

posts.author: MartinK149 (Martin)
posts.cookedHtml:
A simple request - hopefully a quick win.

I would like to have an automation which emails me each week with a list of all tasks that have been complete that week, including the task name and who completed it.

I’d also like to have a schedule for the week ahead to be automatically emailed to me.

These seem like common requests, though searching didn’t seem to find a similar use case or solution. Can you advise if/how this can be done?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Martin,

You could have an automation in Make, or Zapier or just use the Monday API for assembling the list into an email template.

For scheduling emails based on upcoming tasks, it would be similar by setting triggers that catch scheduled updates, compile them using the same or different templates, and automate the distribution via email.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MartinK149

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that provides reporting capabilities which are based on actual reports (static docs) and not dashboards. It allows to solve this exact case. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 18.09.172118×530 28.8 KB

These reports are sent via monday.com notification & email and can also solves a bunch of other cases but I’ll let you find those out
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000291

Hope that helps!
